sentiment: The invisible air we breathe shapes every thought we think.

stories.title: The bottleneck might be the air in the room
stories.summary: Indoor CO2 levels may quietly degrade decision-making and cognitive performance, especially in sealed offices and meeting rooms.

stories.title: Agentic coding notes from Galapagos Island
stories.summary: Dan Luu reflects on using agentic coding tools from an isolated location, examining how context and environment shape AI-assisted development.

stories.title: Leanstral 1.5: Proof abundance for all
stories.summary: Mistral releases Leanstral 1.5, a proof assistant model bringing formal mathematical verification capabilities to a broader audience.
